name: carousel
description: Creates and formats interactive content carousels, slide presentations, and swipeable markdown UI components. Use when the user wants to display content as slides, a gallery, a step-by-step walkthrough, or any sequential multi-panel format.
examples: Turn these bullet points into a carousel
Make a slide presentation for my project overview
Create a swipeable gallery of these screenshots
Build a step-by-step carousel for this tutorial
